AAL.name: American Airlines Group
AAL.summary: American Airlines Group Inc. is a holding company that owns and operates American Airlines, Inc., a major airline in the United States. The company was formed in 1982 and is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas. Its primary operations include airline operations, with subsidiaries including Envoy Aviation Group Inc., PSA Airlines, Inc., and Piedmont Airlines, Inc.

BA.name: BOEING CO
BA.summary: Boeing is a major aerospace firm that develops, produces, and markets commercial jet aircraft, defense systems, and global services. The company operates in three reportable segments: Commercial Airplanes, Defense, Space & Security, and Global Services. Its commercial jet aircraft include the 737 narrow-body model.
BA.news_role: Boeing's 737 Max 10 production is expected to be certified by the FAA before the end of the year, which could positively impact its financial news.

BAC.name: Bank of America
BAC.summary: Bank of America is a Delaware corporation and a bank holding company, serving individual consumers, small- and middle-market businesses, institutions, and governments. The company aims to streamline its organizational structure and reduce complexity and costs. It is one of the world's largest financial institutions.
BAC.news_role: Bank of America is currently positioned in financial news as a major financial institution, with a recent survey indicating that 30% of respondents would not change their summer travel plans due to higher gas prices.

CARR.name: Carrier Global
CARR.summary: Carrier Global is a global leader in intelligent climate and energy solutions, providing differentiated, digitally enabled lifecycle solutions to customers through its industry-leading brands. The company offers innovative heating, cooling, and cold chain solutions, as well as related building services. Its goal is to create long-term shareowner value by investing strategically.

COIN.name: Coinbase Global, Inc.
COIN.summary: Coinbase Global, Inc. is a platform that enables easy engagement with crypto assets, aiming to update the century-old financial system. It provides a trusted and secure platform for retail users, institutions, and developers to engage in the future of finance. The company has expanded its assets to include stocks, commodity futures, perpetual futures, and prediction markets.
COIN.news_role: Coinbase Global is currently positioned as a key player in the cryptocurrency and fintech space, leveraging its new product to gain exposure to private companies.

COO.name: Cooper
COO.summary: Cooper Companies, Inc. is a leading global medical device company that sells products in over 130 countries, positively impacting over fifty million lives each year. The company operates through two business segments, CooperVision and CooperSurgical, which elevate standards of care in the fields of vision, fertility, and women's health. Cooper's products and services are used to help people experience life's beautiful moments.

CRM.name: Salesforce, Inc.
CRM.summary: Salesforce is a global leader in customer relationship management (CRM) technology, providing a unified platform to help organizations become agile enterprises. The company's AI-powered platform unites its offerings, spanning sales, service, marketing, and more, to create a complete view of customers. This platform enables trusted enterprise execution and growth innovation.
CRM.news_role: Salesforce is experiencing financial scrutiny due to its significant AI-related layoffs in 2025, a trend shared by other tech giants.

DIS.name: Walt Disney Co
DIS.summary: The Walt Disney Company is a diversified worldwide entertainment company with operations in three segments: Entertainment, Sports and Experiences. The Entertainment segment includes global film and episodic content production and distribution activities. The company produces content for various networks, including ABC, Disney, Freeform, FX, and National Geographic.
DIS.news_role: Disney is positioned as a leader in the advertising business, with Rita Ferro driving growth in its ad-supported streaming business.

FLUT.name: Flutter Entertainment
FLUT.summary: Flutter Entertainment is a global gaming company that operates through its subsidiaries, including Paddy Power and FanDuel. The company was formed through the merger of three independent bookmakers and has since expanded into other gaming markets. It has also invested in market-making on third-party platforms.
FLUT.news_role: Flutter Entertainment is positioned as a major player in the gaming industry, with its subsidiaries Paddy Power and FanDuel continuing to operate despite regulatory uncertainty.

GOOG.name: Alphabet Inc.
GOOG.summary: Alphabet Inc. is a parent company of Google, investing in artificial intelligence and other moonshots, with a focus on tackling big problems and driving innovation. The company reports its businesses in two segments: Google Services and Google Cloud, and Other Bets. Alphabet is an AI-first company, with a collection of businesses led by CEO Sundar Pichai.
GOOG.news_role: Alphabet Inc. is positioned as a key player in AI and connectivity, with its Gemini project and fiber broadband business competing with Apple and SpaceX.

GS.name: GOLDMAN SACHS GROUP INC
GS.summary: Goldman Sachs is a leading global financial institution that delivers a wide range of financial services, including global banking and markets, asset and wealth management, platform solutions, and more. The company aims to deliver long-term value to its shareholders through its various business segments. Goldman Sachs operates in a competitive landscape with other financial institutions.
GS.news_role: Goldman Sachs Group is positioned as a bullish analyst, forecasting growth in various sectors and highlighting the potential of Apple's new Siri.

HOOD.name: Robinhood Markets, Inc.
HOOD.summary: Robinhood Markets, Inc. is a financial services platform that aims to democratize finance for all by providing simple and convenient access to the financial system. The company uses technology to empower customers to achieve their financial goals through investing. Its mission is to make investing familiar and welcoming for everyone.
HOOD.news_role: Robinhood Markets is currently positioned in financial news as it unveiled tools allowing AI agents to trade stocks and make purchases on users' behalf, marking one of the first attempts to bring autonomous finance technology to ordinary investors.

HPE.name: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co
HPE.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise is a global technology leader focused on developing intelligent solutions that allow customers to capture, analyze and act upon data seamlessly from edge to cloud. The company enables customers to accelerate business outcomes by driving new business models, creating new customer and employee experiences, and increasing operational efficiency. Its legacy dates back to a partnership founded in 1939 by William R. Hewlett and David Packard.

INTC.name: INTEL CORP
INTC.summary: Intel Corp designs and manufactures semiconductor products, including CPUs, for global customers in various industries. These products are incorporated in computing and related end products and services. Intel markets and sells its products through a combination of direct sales and indirect channels.
INTC.news_role: Intel Corp is likely experiencing a decline in market attention due to investors shifting focus to traditional assets and tech stocks.

JPM.name: JPMORGAN CHASE & CO
JPM.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is a leading financial services firm providing investment banking, financial services for consumers and small businesses, commercial banking, financial transaction processing, and asset management. The firm serves millions of customers globally and has a market capitalization of over $450 billion. It is led by CEO Jamie Dimon, who has expressed interest in acquiring a large bank to expand its operations.
JPM.news_role: As a rival to Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan Chase is utilizing AI agents internally for various purposes, including writing code.

LHX.name: L3HARRIS TECHNOLOGIES, INC. /DE/
LHX.summary: L3Harris Technologies, Inc. is a defense industry company providing end-to-end technology solutions connecting space, air, land, sea, and cyber domains for national security. Its solutions have defense, civil government, and commercial applications, supporting customers in over 100 countries. The company's fiscal year ends on the Friday nearest December 31.
LHX.industry: Search, Detection, Navigation, Guidance, Aeronautical Sys

LOAR.name: Loar Holdings Inc.
LOAR.summary: Loar Holdings Inc. specializes in designing, manufacturing, and selling niche aerospace and defense components, with a focus on mission-critical, highly engineered solutions. Approximately 89% of 2025 net sales were derived from proprietary products, and 55% from aftermarket products. This company manufactures components for nearly every major aircraft platform in use today.

MCD.name: MCDONALDS CORP
MCD.summary: McDonald's Corporation franchises and owns and operates McDonald's restaurants serving quality food and beverages in over 100 countries. Approximately 95% of its 45,356 restaurants were franchised at year-end 2025. The company's business structure and operations remained unchanged for the year ended December 31, 2025.

MCO.name: MOODYS CORP /DE/
MCO.summary: Moody's Corporation provides data, insights, and innovative technologies to help customers develop a holistic view of their world and unlock opportunities. The company's offerings are distinguished by its vast proprietary and curated data and validated analytical models. Moody's helps customers navigate an increasingly complex risk landscape.
MCO.news_role: Moody's is providing expert analysis on the potential economic impact of the ongoing war, citing the potential for consumers to become more cautious in their spending.

MKTX.name: MARKETAXESS HOLDINGS INC
MKTX.summary: MarketAxess Holdings Inc. operates electronic trading platforms delivering trading efficiency, liquidity, and cost savings to institutional clients across global fixed-income and other markets. The company focuses on the less electronified fixed-income markets, creating opportunities for growth. Its integrated approach combines trading protocols, execution solutions, data products, and analytics.

MORN.name: Morningstar, Inc.
MORN.summary: Morningstar, Inc. is a leading global provider of independent investment insights, offering a variety of products and solutions to empower investor success. Its mission is to deliver connected data, independent research, and investor-first tools to help investors in three key areas: portfolio strategies, market insights, and investment decisions. The company structures its business to remove frictions and drive up costs in the investment process.

MS.name: MORGAN STANLEY
MS.summary: Morgan Stanley is a global financial services firm that advises, originates, trades, manages, and distributes capital for governments, institutions, and individuals. The company is a financial holding company regulated by the Federal Reserve and conducts business from its headquarters in New York City and other world financial centers. Morgan Stanley provides a range of financial services, including investment management and securities trading.
MS.news_role: Morgan Stanley is leveraging AI technology to enhance its services, positioning it as a leader in innovative financial solutions.

MSFT.name: MICROSOFT CORP
MSFT.summary: Microsoft is a technology company that develops and supports a broad portfolio of technology solutions, focusing on secure, trusted, and innovative platforms and tools for individuals and businesses. Its mission is to empower every person and organization on the planet to achieve more. Microsoft's AI offerings span every layer of the technology stack.
MSFT.news_role: Microsoft is a major player in the AI infrastructure space, but its recent AI layoffs and competition from other tech giants may impact its financial performance.

MU.name: MICRON TECHNOLOGY INC
MU.summary: Micron Technology Inc is a leading manufacturer of memory and storage solutions, providing high-performance DRAM, NAND, and NOR memory and storage products to customers worldwide. The company's innovations fuel the data economy, enabling advances in artificial intelligence and compute-intensive applications. Micron's products are used in various industries, including data centers, client and mobile user experiences.
MU.news_role: Micron Technology's strong demand for its semiconductor products is being linked to a potential hedge against inflation, following Bitcoin's decline.

NFLX.name: NETFLIX INC
NFLX.summary: Netflix, Inc. is a leading entertainment services company offering TV series, films, games, and live programming globally, with a focus on continuous improvement of its members' experience and global growth within its operating margin target.

NOW.name: ServiceNow, Inc.
NOW.summary: ServiceNow, Inc. is a software company that provides enterprise software solutions for IT service management, customer service, and digital workspace management. Its software helps businesses manage their IT services, improve customer experience, and increase productivity. The company's solutions are designed to help businesses automate and streamline their operations.
NOW.news_role: ServiceNow's shares are struggling this year due to the threat from artificial intelligence.

NVDA.name: NVIDIA CORP
NVDA.summary: NVIDIA is a data center scale AI infrastructure company that accelerates computational problems using its CUDA development platform and domain-specific software libraries. Its technology stack facilitates the deployment of accelerated computing for AI, data analytics, scientific computing, robotics, and 3D graphics. The company is now reshaping all industries with its technology.
NVDA.news_role: NVIDIA is a key player in the development of AI-powered cybersecurity solutions and a notable player in the global tech market, particularly in the context of supply chain disruptions and regulatory challenges.

NYT.name: NEW YORK TIMES CO
NYT.summary: The New York Times Company is a global media organization focused on creating and distributing high-quality news and information. Its mission is to help its audience understand and engage with the world through original, independent, and high-quality reporting, storytelling, expertise, and journalistic excellence. This has contributed to its success and recognition with industry and peer accolades.

ORCL.name: ORACLE CORP
ORCL.summary: Oracle provides products and services that address enterprise IT needs, offering flexible and interoperable deployment models for enterprise applications and infrastructure technologies. This aligns with its corporate strategy to provide choice and flexibility to customers. The company's growth strategy is focused on addressing customer needs through broad and comprehensive deployment models.
ORCL.news_role: Oracle is experiencing financial uncertainty due to job cuts, positioning it as a company to watch for potential market impact.

PYPL.name: PayPal Holdings, Inc.
PYPL.summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc. enables digital payments and simplifies commerce experiences for consumers and merchants globally, with a two-sided network connecting 439 million active accounts across 200 markets. Consumers can shop, pay, manage finances, and send/receive money with PayPal and Venmo. The company aims to revolutionize commerce globally.

RBC.name: RBC Bearings INC
RBC.summary: RBC Bearings Incorporated is an international manufacturer and marketer of precision bearings, components, and essential systems for the Industrial and Aerospace & Defense markets. Their products are integral to the manufacture and operation of most machines and mechanical systems, reducing wear and friction. They focus primarily on the higher end of the bearing and gear market.

S.name: SentinelOne, Inc.
S.summary: SentinelOne, Inc. develops endpoint security solutions to empower human operators with the speed, scale, visibility, and precision of technology to stay one step ahead of attackers. The company aims to address intrusion attempts in real-time at machine speed, mitigating damages from cyberattacks. This is part of a generational shift in cybersecurity driven by digital transformation and the rise of AI.

ST.name: Sensata Technologies Holding plc
ST.summary: Sensata Technologies Holding plc is a global industrial technology company that develops and innovates customized solutions for mission-critical applications. The company presents financial information for three reportable segments: Automotive, Industrials, and Aerospace, Defense, and Commercial. Sensata strives to help customers and partners safely deliver a cleaner, more efficient, electrified, and connected world.
ST.industry: Industrial Instruments For Measurement, Display, and Control

TMO.name: THERMO FISHER SCIENTIFIC INC.
TMO.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. is a global leader in serving the needs of science and education with advanced technology products for research, healthcare, education, and commercial laboratories. The company's products and services are used in a wide range of applications, including molecular diagnostics, laboratory equipment, and information technology. Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. is committed to advancing the world of science.

TSLA.name: Tesla, Inc.
TSLA.summary: Tesla, Inc. focuses on bringing artificial intelligence into the real world through products and services like Full Self-Driving and Robotaxi, while designing, developing, manufacturing, selling, and leasing high-performance electric vehicles and energy generation and storage systems.
TSLA.news_role: Tesla's market capitalization is at risk of falling below $1 trillion, which would prevent CEO Elon Musk from becoming the world's first trillionaire.

UAL.name: United Airlines Holdings, Inc.
UAL.summary: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. is a holding company with a comprehensive route network, connecting people and uniting the world. Its subsidiary, United Airlines, Inc., operates with nearly 100% of the company's revenues and expenses. United has hubs in major US cities, including Newark Liberty International Airport.
UAL.news_role: United Airlines is positioned to be significantly impacted by proposed cuts to Customs and Border Protection service at Newark Liberty International Airport.

VIRT.name: Virtu Financial, Inc.
VIRT.summary: Virtu Financial, Inc. is a leading financial firm that leverages cutting-edge technology to deliver liquidity to global markets and provide innovative, transparent trading solutions to clients. It offers a robust product suite including execution, liquidity sourcing, analytics, and broker-neutral platforms. The company provides clients with access to hundreds of venues across over 50 countries and multiple asset classes.

VNOM.name: Viper Energy, Inc.
VNOM.summary: Viper Energy, Inc. is a Delaware corporation that operates in the energy industry, previously as a limited partnership and later as a subsidiary of New Cobra Pubco, Inc. The company has undergone significant changes, including a name change and a merger, in an effort to restructure and adapt to the energy market.

WBD.name: Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc.
WBD.summary: Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc. is a media conglomerate that operates in the film, television, and digital media industries. The company faces challenges in the linear distribution market, including declining subscribers and advertising revenue. Despite these headwinds, Warner Bros. Discovery continues to innovate and expand its digital presence.

AAPL.name: Apple Inc.
AAPL.summary: Apple Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables, and accessories, with a focus on its iPhone, Mac, and iPad product lines.
AAPL.news_role: Apple is a key player in the tech industry, with its WWDC announcement potentially impacting its stock performance and positioning in the financial news.

AMZN.name: AMAZON COM INC
AMZN.summary: Amazon.com Inc. is a customer-centric company guided by four principles: customer obsession, passion for invention, commitment to operational excellence, and long-term thinking. It serves its primary customer sets across various segments and seeks to be Earth's most customer-centric company. The company's products and services include e-commerce, cloud computing, and artificial intelligence.
AMZN.news_role: Amazon.com is a significant player in the AI market and a major competitor in cloud services, but its investments in robotics and AI may lead to a shrinking of its workforce.

ASTS.name: AST SpaceMobile, Inc.
ASTS.summary: AST SpaceMobile, Inc. is building a global Cellular Broadband network in space to provide cost-effective, high-speed services to end-users with existing mobile devices, out of terrestrial cellular coverage. The company plans to utilize its extensive intellectual property and patent portfolio. The SpaceMobile Service is designed to be accessible directly by everyday smartphones.

BRK-B.name: BERKSHIRE HATHAWAY INC
BRK-B.summary: Berkshire Hathaway Inc. is a holding company owning subsidiaries engaged in diverse business activities, including insurance, freight rail transportation, and utility and energy generation and distribution, with a decentralized management structure.
BRK-B.news_role: Berkshire Hathaway's significant investment in Alphabet's stock sale positions it as a major player in the tech sector, capitalizing on unprecedented customer demand.

BX.name: Blackstone Inc.
BX.summary: Blackstone Inc. is the world's largest alternative asset manager, delivering compelling returns for institutional and individual investors through its global investment strategies focused on real estate, private equity, infrastructure, and more. Its scale, diversified business, and rigorous investment process position it to perform well in various market conditions. Blackstone seeks to strengthen companies and assets in which it invests.
BX.news_role: Blackstone Inc. is facing liquidity pressures in private markets, prompting it to restrict withdrawals from its flagship fund.

DASH.name: DoorDash, Inc.
DASH.summary: DoorDash, Inc. is a food delivery and logistics company that aims to grow and empower local economies by providing services that reduce friction in local commerce. Its primary offerings include the DoorDash Marketplace and Commerce Platform, which operate in over 40 countries. The company's Marketplaces serve merchants, consumers, and Dashers.
DASH.news_role: DoorDash, Inc. is a workflow-driven enterprise SaaS company in the food delivery and logistics space, potentially vulnerable to disruptions in the next decade.

DE.name: DEERE & CO
DE.summary: DEERE & CO is a manufacturer of heavy equipment, including tractors, backhoes, and other agricultural and construction equipment. The company's products are used in various industries such as agriculture, construction, and forestry. DEERE & CO's forward-looking statements relate to its financial condition, results of operations, and business.
DE.news_role: Deere & Co is being drawn into the space industry through its inclusion in the ARKX ETF, a fund focused on space and defense innovation.

IBKR.name: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc.
IBKR.summary: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. is an automated global broker that specializes in routing orders and executing trades in various financial instruments, including stocks, options, futures, and cryptocurrencies. The company provides custody and servicing services for hedge and mutual funds, exchange-traded funds, and individual investors. It operates in 40 countries and 29 currencies around the world.
IBKR.news_role: Interactive Brokers Group is a key player in the financial services industry, with its recent integration of Kalshi contracts positioning it for growth in the retail and institutional investor markets.

KBR.name: KBR, INC.
KBR.summary: KBR, Inc. delivers science, technology, engineering and logistics support solutions to the U.S. federal government, allied nations and commercial clients around the world, focusing on national security and defense systems engineering, data analytics, and sustainment engineering.
KBR.industry: Heavy Construction Other Than Bldg Const - Contractors

LMT.name: LOCKHEED MARTIN CORP
LMT.summary: Lockheed Martin is a global aerospace and defense technology company providing integrated solutions across all warfighting domains, serving U.S. and international customers in defense, civil, and commercial applications.

META.name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
META.summary: Meta Platforms, Inc. develops technology that enables people to connect and share through various devices and platforms, innovating in artificial intelligence to build transformative experiences. The company aims to deliver personal superintelligence for everyone. Its products include social media platforms, virtual reality headsets, and AI-powered capabilities.
META.news_role: As a leader in AI infrastructure and social media, Meta Platforms is a key player in the tech industry's financial news.

MRNA.name: Moderna, Inc.
MRNA.summary: Moderna, Inc. is a pioneer in mRNA medicine, developing vaccine and therapeutic candidates for various diseases. Its mRNA platform has enabled the development of commercial products such as Spikevax and mNEXSPIKE, and mRESVIA. The company aims to deliver the greatest possible impact through mRNA medicines.

MRP.name: Millrose Properties, Inc.
MRP.summary: Millrose Properties, Inc. (MRP) is a publicly traded company that purchases and develops residential land, selling finished homesites to homebuilders through option contracts. This strategy allows homebuilders to expand access to finished homesites while maintaining an asset-light approach. MRP serves as a solution for homebuilders seeking to increase access to finished homesites.

MRVL.name: Marvell Technology, Inc.
MRVL.summary: Marvell Technology, Inc. is a leading supplier of data infrastructure semiconductor solutions, developing high-performance chips for cloud computing, AI, enterprise networking, 5G carrier networks, and automotive systems.
MRVL.news_role: Marvell Technology, Inc. is a key player in the artificial intelligence infrastructure boom, but its contribution to the global tech market decline is a concern.

NIQ.name: NIQ Global Intelligence plc
NIQ.summary: NIQ Global Intelligence plc provides a holistic view of consumer shopping behavior globally, driving strategic and operating decisions for brands, retailers, and clients. The company aggregates and enriches vast amounts of global consumer shopping data using its unified, AI-powered technology platform. This enables better economic outcomes.

PEP.name: PEPSICO INC
PEP.summary: PepsiCo Inc is a leading global beverage and convenient food company with a portfolio of brands including Lay's, Doritos, Gatorade, Pepsi-Cola, Mountain Dew, Quaker and SodaStream. The company makes, markets, distributes and sells a wide variety of beverages and convenient foods through its operations, authorized bottlers, contract manufacturers and other third parties. PepsiCo serves customers and consumers globally.

QCOM.name: QUALCOMM INC/DE
QCOM.summary: QUALCOMM INC/DE is a global technology leader that develops and manufactures wireless and wired communication systems, and is helping to bring intelligent computing everywhere through the development of 5G, AI, and automotive technologies. The company operates using a 52-53 week fiscal year ending on the last Sunday in September. Its products and technologies are used in a variety of markets, including mobile devices, automotive systems, and industrial equipment.
QCOM.news_role: Qualcomm is currently positioned in financial news as a competitor to Nvidia in the PC market, with its new SoCs for Windows laptops indicating its involvement in the market.

RKLB.name: Rocket Lab Corp
RKLB.summary: Rocket Lab Corp is an end-to-end space company delivering reliable launch services, spacecraft design services, and other solutions to make space access faster, easier, and more affordable. The company aims to improve life on Earth by leveraging space for innovation, exploration, and infrastructure. With a proven track record of mission success, Rocket Lab is one of the select few commercial companies delivering regular access to orbit.
RKLB.news_role: Rocket Lab Corp is a top holding in the Procure Space ETF, indicating its strong presence in the space industry and financial news.

SCHW.name: SCHWAB CHARLES CORP
SCHW.summary: Charles Schwab Corporation is a savings and loan holding company that provides wealth management, securities brokerage, banking, asset management, custody, and financial advisory services. It operates through its subsidiaries, including Charles Schwab & Co., Inc., Charles Schwab Bank, SSB, and Charles Schwab Investment Management, Inc. The company had $11.90 trillion in client assets as of December 31, 2025.
SCHW.news_role: Charles Schwab is currently positioned as a relatively low-demand product for prediction markets among its traders.

SNX.name: TD SYNNEX CORP
SNX.summary: TD Synnex Corp is a Fortune 100 corporation that distributes and aggregates IT products from leading vendors, helping customers create solutions to maximize business outcomes. The company serves a critical role in the IT ecosystem, providing a wide range of products including hardware, software, and systems. It also designs and delivers purpose-built server, storage, and networking solutions for hyperscale computing.

SPGI.name: S&P Global Inc.
SPGI.summary: S&P Global Inc. is a global provider of benchmarks, data, analytics, and workflow solutions for the capital, energy, commodity, and automotive markets. The company serves a broad range of customers, including asset managers, investment banks, and producers, through its diversified offerings. Its solutions are used in various industries, including finance, energy, and manufacturing.
SPGI.news_role: S&P Global's significant investment in OpenAI and its decision on index requirements position it as a key player in the tech and finance sectors.

TGT.name: TARGET CORP
TGT.summary: Target Corporation is a retail company that offers fashionable merchandise and everyday essentials at discounted prices, aiming to help all families discover the joy of everyday life. The company operates as a single segment, enabling guests to purchase products seamlessly in stores or through digital channels. Target has a corporate purpose to give 5% of its profit to communities since 1946.

TW.name: Tradeweb Markets Inc.
TW.summary: Tradeweb Markets Inc. is a leader in building and operating electronic marketplaces for the global financial ecosystem, facilitating trading of various asset classes across multiple clients. The company supports clients across the trade lifecycle, from pre-trade to post-trade solutions. Its platform includes marketplaces for rates, credit, equities, and money markets.
TW.news_role: Tradeweb Markets is expanding its data access to prediction markets and trading through its partnership with Kalshi.
TW.industry: Security & Commodity Brokers, Dealers, Exchanges & Services

V.name: VISA INC.
V.summary: Visa Inc. facilitates secure, reliable, and efficient global commerce and money movement through its transaction processing services, primarily authorization, clearing, and settlement, and has expanded its model to include digital banks, wallets, fintechs, governments, and NGOs.

XP.name: XP Inc.
XP.summary: XP Inc. is a financial holding company that provides financial solutions by universalizing access to top-quality financial services through a strategy that explores the synergy between retail investment, retail cross-sell, and wholesale banking. The company offers financial services through its affiliates. XP Inc. is incorporated under the laws of the Cayman Islands.

ACGL.name: ARCH CAPITAL GROUP LTD.
ACGL.summary: Arch Capital Group Ltd. is a publicly listed Bermuda exempted company providing insurance, reinsurance, and mortgage insurance on a worldwide basis through its wholly owned subsidiaries. It is part of the S&P 500 index with approximately $26.9 billion in capital. The company offers a full range of property, casualty, and mortgage insurance and reinsurance lines.

AGO.name: ASSURED GUARANTY LTD
AGO.summary: Assured Guaranty Ltd. provides credit protection products to the U.S. and non-U.S. public finance and structured finance markets, offering financial guaranty insurance to protect holders of debt instruments from defaults. The company applies its credit underwriting judgment and risk management skills to offer financial guaranty insurance. Assured Guaranty also participates in the asset management business.

AMG.name: AFFILIATED MANAGERS GROUP, INC.
AMG.summary: Affiliated Managers Group, Inc. (AMG) is a strategic partner to leading independent investment firms globally, investing in high-quality independent partner-owned firms through a proven partnership approach. AMG generates long-term value by allocating resources across its unique opportunity set to areas of highest growth and return. This approach enables high-quality, partner-owned firms to capitalize on opportunities and meet client objectives.

AMGN.name: AMGEN INC
AMGN.summary: Amgen Inc. discovers, develops, manufactures and delivers innovative medicines to fight some of the world's toughest diseases, focusing on areas of high unmet medical need. The company has a robust pipeline and a presence in approximately 100 countries worldwide. Amgen has grown to be one of the world's leading independent biotechnology companies.

AVGO.name: Broadcom Inc.
AVGO.summary: Broadcom Inc. is a global technology leader that designs, develops and supplies semiconductor and software solutions, with a diverse history of innovation through acquisitions.
AVGO.news_role: Broadcom Inc. is a key player in the AI chip market, with its customized AI chips being a significant focus in financial news.

CRWD.name: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc.
CRWD.summary: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. is a cloud-native cybersecurity platform provider that utilizes artificial intelligence to deliver real-time threat protection. Founded in 2011, the company has transformed the way cybersecurity is delivered and experienced by customers. Its Falcon platform serves as the operating system for cybersecurity.
CRWD.news_role: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (CRWD) is currently a standout in the cybersecurity sector, following the introduction of its powerful AI model Mythos.

EG.name: EVEREST GROUP, LTD.
EG.summary: Everest Group, Ltd. is a Bermuda-based reinsurance and insurance organization focused on diversifying its portfolio and geographic presence. It serves a diverse group of clients worldwide, providing extensive product and distribution capabilities, a strong balance sheet, and access to world-class talent. As a leading financial services institution, it operates through its Reinsurance and Insurance reportable segments.

EMR.name: EMERSON ELECTRIC CO
EMR.summary: Emerson Electric Co. relies on the skills and experience of its management and key employees to succeed in its operations and performance. The company's ability to attract, develop, and retain highly qualified personnel is crucial to its business goals. Failure to do so could negatively impact its business and operating results.
EMR.industry: Electronic & Other Electrical Equipment (No Computer Equip)

G.name: Genpact LTD
G.summary: Genpact LTD is an agentic and advanced technology solutions company providing innovative solutions to transform how businesses run, leveraging decades of client trust and a strong partner ecosystem. With a team of over 146,500 employees and $5.1 billion in total net revenues for 2025, Genpact delivers lasting value to the world's leading enterprises. The company was established over 25 years ago as the global capability center for General Electric Company.

GLOB.name: Globant S.A.
GLOB.summary: Globant S.A. is a global technology services company focused on supporting organizations' digital transformation and creating opportunities for talent worldwide. Founded in 2003, the company has expanded its network to 31 countries through organic growth and strategic acquisitions. Its objective is to build a global technology services company with a positive global impact.

GLPI.name: Gaming & Leisure Properties, Inc.
GLPI.summary: Gaming & Leisure Properties, Inc. (GLPI) is a self-administered and self-managed Pennsylvania REIT that owns and operates gaming and hospitality properties. The company was spun off from Penn National Gaming, Inc. in 2013 and has been focused on growing its portfolio of gaming and hospitality assets. GLPI's business is centered around the operation and management of its properties.

HSIC.name: HENRY SCHEIN INC
HSIC.summary: Henry Schein Inc is a solutions company for health care professionals, providing products and services to office-based dental and medical practitioners, as well as alternate sites of care. With 94 years of experience, they serve over one million customers worldwide. Their philosophy is to serve as trusted advisors to help customers operate more efficiently and successfully.

LLY.name: ELI LILLY & Co
LLY.summary: ELI LILLY & Co (LLY) is a pharmaceutical company that discovers, develops, manufactures, and markets human pharmaceutical products. The company aims to unite caring with discovery to create medicines that make life better for people around the world. Its products are sold in approximately 90 countries.
LLY.news_role: ELI LILLY & Co (LLY) is positioned as a financially strong and attractive partner for growth prospects.

MET.name: METLIFE INC
MET.summary: MetLife Inc. is a leading financial services company providing insurance, annuities, employee benefits, and asset management. It holds market positions in the US, Asia, Latin America, Europe, and the Middle East. The company is a Delaware corporation incorporated in 1999.

OXY.name: OCCIDENTAL PETROLEUM CORP /DE/
OXY.summary: Occidental Petroleum Corporation is an international energy company with diversified assets in the US, Middle East, and North Africa, ranking among the largest oil and gas producers in the US. The company holds leading positions in the Permian and DJ Basin. It is recognized for its premier diversified assets and sustainable value creation for shareholders.
OXY.news_role: As a result of Berkshire Hathaway's acquisition of its chemical business, Occidental Petroleum's core oil and gas operations are currently positioned for financial stability.

PHM.name: PULTEGROUP INC/MI/
PHM.summary: PulteGroup, Inc. is a homebuilding company that has delivered over 875,000 homes, and is one of the largest homebuilders in the United States. The company's common shares are included in the S&P 500 Index and trade on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol PHM. PulteGroup has subsidiaries that engage in homebuilding and financial services businesses.
PHM.news_role: PulteGroup Inc is not currently positioned in financial news, as the recent nomination of William Pulte to serve as the Director of National Intelligence is the only relevant information.

PLTR.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
PLTR.summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. builds software to integrate data, decisions, and operations at scale for organizations, initially serving the intelligence community before expanding to commercial enterprises. The company has developed four software platforms: Gotham, Foundry, Apollo, and Artificial Intelligence Platform. Palantir's software empowers organizations to effectively manage and analyze large datasets.

PRU.name: PRUDENTIAL FINANCIAL INC
PRU.summary: Prudential Financial, Inc. is a global financial services leader offering a wide array of financial products and services, including life insurance, retirement strategies, and investment management, with operations in the United States, Asia, Europe, and Latin America.

RDDT.name: Reddit, Inc.
RDDT.summary: Reddit, Inc. is a platform that empowers communities and makes their knowledge accessible to everyone. It provides a global digital city where users can join communities to learn, engage, and explore passions. The company believes that community is essential to human creativity and well-being.
RDDT.news_role: Reddit's user-generated content model is being cited as an inspiration for social media regulation efforts, positioning the company as a key player in discussions around online public squares.

TIGO.name: MILLICOM INTERNATIONAL CELLULAR SA
TIGO.summary: Millicom International Cellular SA (TIGO) is a telecommunications company that provides mobile and fixed-line services to customers in Latin America. The company's ability to adapt to rapid technological change and evolving industry standards is a significant risk factor. If the company fails to adapt, it could negatively impact its business, financial condition, and results of operations.

WELL.name: WELLTOWER INC.
WELL.summary: Welltower Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on rental housing for aging seniors across the US, UK, and Canada, offering a unique blend of housing and hospitality.

AES.name: AES CORP
AES.summary: AES Corp is a global energy company that delivers greener, smarter energy solutions to improve lives. The company accelerates the future of energy by partnering with customers on their strategic energy transitions and meeting their energy needs. With over four decades of experience, AES is the next-generation energy company.

AMAT.name: APPLIED MATERIALS INC /DE
AMAT.summary: Applied Materials Inc. is a leader in materials engineering solutions for semiconductor production, serving a wide range of industries including personal computing, mobile phones, artificial intelligence, and electric vehicles. The company designs, develops, produces, and services critical wafer fabrication tools. Its products are used in various applications, including consumer electronics, industrial applications, and automotive industries.

AMD.name: ADVANCED MICRO DEVICES INC
AMD.summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (AMD) designs, manufactures, and sells computer processors and related technologies for the computing and communications industries. The company's products include microprocessors, microprocessors with integrated memory controllers, and chipsets. AMD's products are used in a variety of applications, including personal computers, servers, and gaming consoles.
AMD.news_role: AMD's stock price more than doubled this year, alongside chipmakers Intel and Micron.

AMKR.name: AMKOR TECHNOLOGY, INC.
AMKR.summary: Amkor Technology, Inc. is the world's largest U.S. headquartered outsourced semiconductor assembly and test service provider, offering advanced packaging, wafer-level processing, and system-in-package solutions for various industries such as smartphones, data centers, and automobiles.

ANET.name: Arista Networks, Inc.
ANET.summary: Arista Networks, Inc. enables customers to access their data centers in the quickest, most reliable, and secure manner through its data-driven, client-to-cloud networking-as-a-service. The company delivers a unified approach to networking, connecting AI Centers, Data Centers, Campus Centers, and WAN Centers. Arista's Extensible Operating System (EOS) and Network Data Lake (NetDL) anchor its strategy.

AUR.name: Aurora Innovation, Inc.
AUR.summary: Aurora Innovation, Inc. aims to deliver self-driving technology safely, quickly, and broadly, with a mission to fundamentally transform the global transportation industry. The company was founded in 2017 by prominent leaders in the self-driving space and has launched the Aurora Driver based on advanced hardware, software, and data services. Aurora's goal is to revolutionize transportation.

BAM.name: Brookfield Asset Management Ltd.
BAM.summary: Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. is a leading global alternative asset manager with over $1 trillion of Assets Under Management, investing client capital in infrastructure, renewable power, private equity, real estate, and credit, with a focus on real assets and essential service businesses.

BLSH.name: Bullish
BLSH.summary: Bullish is a financial services company that was incorporated in 2021 and has since undergone internal reorganization and acquisitions, including the purchase of CoinDesk businesses and CCData. The company has operating subsidiaries in the US, Europe, and Hong Kong. As of the current year, Bullish is the parent company of multiple entities.

C.name: CITIGROUP INC
C.summary: Citigroup is a global diversified financial services holding company with a history dating back to 1812, providing various businesses that consume financial services. The company's businesses include banking, securities, and insurance services. Citigroup operates globally and is a leading financial services company.
C.news_role: Citigroup is playing a significant role in driving Bitcoin price appreciation through investor adoption and appetite.

CBOE.name: Cboe Global Markets, Inc.
CBOE.summary: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. is a leading derivatives and securities exchange network that delivers cutting-edge trading, clearing, and investment solutions across multiple asset classes, including equities, derivatives, and FX. The company provides trading solutions and products to people around the world. Its services enable efficient and secure trading, clearing, and investment activities.
CBOE.industry: Security & Commodity Brokers, Dealers, Exchanges & Services

CG.name: Carlyle Group Inc.
CG.summary: Carlyle Group Inc. is a global investment firm that deploys private capital across three business segments: Global Private Equity, Global Credit, and Carlyle AlpInvest. With $477 billion in AUM, the firm has grown to manage investments across a range of strategies leveraging industry expertise and global resources. Carlyle serves over 3,200 active carry fund investors from 87 countries.
CG.news_role: As a key figure in providing insights on the current economic landscape, Carlyle Group Inc. is relevant to discussions of Federal Reserve policy challenges.

CME.name: CME GROUP INC.
CME.summary: CME Group Inc. enables clients to trade various financial products, optimize portfolios, and analyze data, providing primary price discovery and referential pricing information. It operates a leading central counterparty clearing provider and offers industry-leading research and analytics tools. The company provides market education resources to its customers.
CME.industry: Security & Commodity Brokers, Dealers, Exchanges & Services

COF.name: CAPITAL ONE FINANCIAL CORP
COF.summary: Capital One Financial Corporation is a diversified financial services holding company providing banking and non-banking services to consumers, small businesses, and commercial clients through digital channels and branch locations. It operates as a global payments provider and delivers a broad array of financial products and services. Capital One's principal operating subsidiary is Capital One, National Association.

ELAN.name: Elanco Animal Health Inc
ELAN.summary: Elanco Animal Health Inc is a global leader in animal health, innovating and delivering products and services to prevent and treat disease in farm animals and pets. The company partners with farmers, pet owners, veterinarians, and society to create value and improve animal health. Elanco's diverse product portfolio serves animals across many species, primarily dogs, cats, cattle, poultry, swine, and sheep.
ELAN.news_role: Elanco Animal Health's shares are rising in tandem with Zoetis, a leading competitor, indicating a strong market position for the company.

EVR.name: Evercore Inc.
EVR.summary: Evercore Inc. is a leading independent investment banking firm that advises on worldwide M&A transactions, providing a conflict-free environment for clients. The company was founded on the belief that independent investment banking firms can maintain high standards of excellence and integrity. Evercore advises clients on M&A transactions, providing expert guidance and support.
EVR.news_role: As a prominent analyst at Evercore, Mark Mahaney is likely providing insights and analysis on various companies, including those mentioned in the news cluster summaries.

GM.name: General Motors Co
GM.summary: General Motors Co (GM) designs, builds, and sells trucks, crossovers, cars, and automobile parts, providing software-enabled services and subscriptions worldwide. The company operates through segments GM North America and GM International, with brands including Buick, Cadillac, Chevrolet, and GMC. GM also has equity ownership stakes in entities in China.
GM.news_role: As a leading automaker, General Motors Co is positioned as a key player in the transition to electrification and battery technologies in the automotive industry.

GMED.name: GLOBUS MEDICAL INC
GMED.summary: Globus Medical, Inc. is a medical device company that develops and commercializes healthcare solutions for musculoskeletal disorders. Founded in 2003, Globus focuses on innovation and exceptional service to hospitals, ambulatory surgery centers, and physicians. Its mission is to improve patient quality of life.

ISRG.name: INTUITIVE SURGICAL INC
ISRG.summary: Intuitive Surgical Inc designs, manufactures, and markets surgical systems, including the da Vinci Surgical System, for minimally invasive procedures. The company's products are used in various medical specialties, such as urology, gynecology, and general surgery. Intuitive Surgical Inc is a leader in the field of robotic-assisted surgery.

JAZZ.name: Jazz Pharmaceuticals plc
JAZZ.summary: Jazz Pharmaceuticals plc is a global biopharmaceutical company focused on developing life-changing medicines for patients with rare diseases. The company has a diverse portfolio of medicines addressing various conditions, including epilepsies, cancers, and sleep disorders. Its lead marketed product, Xywav, is approved in multiple countries for improving patient care.

KLAC.name: KLA CORP
KLAC.summary: KLA Corporation supplies industry-leading equipment and services to the electronics industry, providing advanced process control and process-enabling solutions for manufacturing wafers, ICs, and PCBs.

LULU.name: lululemon athletica inc.
LULU.summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc. designs, distributes, and retails technical athletic apparel, footwear, and accessories, aiming to create transformative products and experiences that promote wellbeing and connection. The company fosters a distinctive corporate culture based on core values such as personal responsibility, courage, connection, and fun. This culture attracts passionate employees driven to achieve personal and professional goals.
LULU.news_role: Lululemon Athletica is experiencing financial struggles, with a 11% decline in shares after lowering full-year earnings and revenue guidance.
LULU.industry: Apparel & Other Finishd Prods of  Fabrics & Similar Matl

MDB.name: MongoDB, Inc.
MDB.summary: MongoDB is a developer data platform company that empowers developers to create, transform, and disrupt industries by providing a globally distributed operational database and a set of data services. The company's database is designed to handle unstructured data and meet the needs of organizations for performance, scalability, flexibility, and reliability. Its mission is to unleash the power of software and data.
MDB.news_role: MongoDB competes with Amazon's Aurora in the AI infrastructure investment boom, positioning it as a relevant player in the database service market.

MRK.name: Merck & Co., Inc.
MRK.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. is a global healthcare company that delivers innovative health solutions through its prescription medicines, including biologic therapies, vaccines, and animal health products. The company operates on a product basis, with two reportable segments: Pharmaceutical and Animal Health. Its pharmaceutical products are sold primarily to drug wholesalers, retailers, hospitals, government agencies, and managed care organizations.

MSCI.name: MSCI Inc.
MSCI.summary: MSCI Inc. provides research-based data, analytics, and indexes to global investors, helping them make better investment decisions and unlock innovation. Its tools and solutions aid in defining investment universes, making asset allocation decisions, and managing investment risk and performance. MSCI's offerings also integrate sustainability and climate considerations into portfolio construction and risk management.

NDAQ.name: NASDAQ, INC.
NDAQ.summary: NASDAQ, INC. is a leading technology platform that powers the world's economies by architecting the infrastructure of modern markets, powering the innovation economy, and building trust in the financial system. It empowers economic opportunity through technology, data, and advanced analytics. The company operates in three business segments: Capital Access Platforms, Financial Technology, and Market Services.
NDAQ.news_role: As a tech-heavy index, Nasdaq is currently positioned in financial news due to the decline of technology stocks.
NDAQ.industry: Security & Commodity Brokers, Dealers, Exchanges & Services

NKE.name: NIKE, Inc.
NKE.summary: NIKE, Inc. designs, develops, and markets athletic footwear, apparel, equipment, accessories, and services worldwide. The company is the largest seller of athletic footwear and apparel globally. Its products are sold through NIKE Direct operations, digital platforms, and wholesale accounts.
NKE.news_role: Nike's women's business is a multibillion-dollar franchise, indicating a strong financial position.

PANW.name: Palo Alto Networks Inc
PANW.summary: Palo Alto Networks Inc (PANW) is a global cybersecurity provider that aims to protect the digital way of life through its comprehensive cybersecurity platforms and services. The company helps enterprises, organizations, and government entities secure their users, networks, clouds, and endpoints using artificial intelligence and automation. Its mission is to be the cybersecurity partner of choice.
PANW.news_role: Palo Alto Networks is currently a standout performer in financial news, driven by the significant increase in its shares following the introduction of its powerful AI model, Mythos.

PLNT.name: Planet Fitness, Inc.
PLNT.summary: Planet Fitness, Inc. is a Delaware corporation that operates one of the largest and fastest-growing franchisors and operators of fitness centers in the world. The company's mission is to provide a high-quality fitness experience in a welcoming environment, known as the Judgement Free Zone. With a focus on cleanliness and friendly staff, Planet Fitness aims to enhance people's lives through fitness.

RBRK.name: Rubrik, Inc.
RBRK.summary: Rubrik, Inc. is a cybersecurity company that provides Zero Trust data security solutions to help organizations secure their data across the cloud and recover from cyberattacks. The company's solution, the Rubrik Security Cloud, is designed with a Zero Trust principle to deliver cyber resilience. This approach aims to prevent cyberattacks by securing data, resulting in AI resilience for businesses.
RBRK.news_role: As a testing partner in Anthropic's Project Glasswing, Rubrik is positioned as a key player in the emerging AI and data analytics space.

RKT.name: Rocket Companies, Inc.
RKT.summary: Rocket Companies, Inc. is a Detroit-based fintech company offering mortgage, real estate, and personal finance services through its AI-powered, vertically integrated homeownership ecosystem. The company aims to deliver industry-best client experiences and is recognized for its simple, fast, and trusted digital experiences. Its flagship business, Rocket Mortgage, is the nation's largest mortgage originator and servicer.

SPOT.name: Spotify Technology S.A.
SPOT.summary: Spotify Technology S.A. is a Luxembourg public limited liability company that operates as a music streaming service provider, offering a platform for users to access and stream music content. The company was incorporated in 2006 and transformed into a public limited liability company in 2009. Its shares are publicly traded and registered on a stock exchange.

SWKS.name: SKYWORKS SOLUTIONS, INC.
SWKS.summary: Skyworks Solutions, Inc. is a leading developer and provider of analog and mixed-signal semiconductor products and solutions for various applications, including aerospace, automotive, and consumer electronics. The company targets high-growth verticals and seeks to diversify its revenue and customer set. It has made important investments in key network technologies.

TER.name: TERADYNE, INC
TER.summary: Teradyne, Inc. is a leading global provider of automated test equipment and robotics solutions, serving various industries including consumer electronics, wireless, automotive, and aerospace and defense. Its products are used to test semiconductors, wireless products, and complex electronics systems, while its robotics offerings consist of collaborative robotic arms and autonomous mobile robots. These solutions aim to improve quality, increase efficiency, and reduce costs in manufacturing and logistics.
TER.industry: Instruments For Meas & Testing of  Electricity & Elec Signals

TKO.name: TKO Group Holdings, Inc.
TKO.summary: TKO Group Holdings, Inc. is a premium sports and entertainment company that owns and operates UFC, WWE, PBR, and Zuffa Boxing, reaching over 1 billion households across 210 countries and territories. It organizes over 500 live events year-round and services sports rights holders through IMG and On Location. TKO's businesses attract over three million fans.

ZTS.name: Zoetis Inc.
ZTS.summary: Zoetis Inc. is a global leader in the animal health industry, developing and commercializing medicines, vaccines, and diagnostics for various animal species. The company has a diversified business, covering eight core species and seven major product categories. With nearly 75 years of legacy, Zoetis continues to pioneer ways to predict, prevent, detect, and treat animal illness.
ZTS.news_role: Zoetis Inc. is experiencing increased bullish sentiment among investors, as indicated by a surge in options volume.

SPCX.name: SpaceX
SPCX.summary: SpaceX is a private aerospace manufacturer and space transport services company. It designs, manufactures, and launches advanced rockets and spacecraft. The company aims to reduce space transportation costs and enable the colonization of Mars.
SPCX.news_role: SpaceX is poised to make a significant impact on the financial news scene with its highly anticipated $1.77 trillion IPO valuation.
